item.title: Bearded Dragon Lighting Setup: UVB Schedule
item.description: Proper lighting is absolutely essential for bearded dragon health and survival. In the wild, these desert reptiles bask for hours under intense sunlight, absorbing UVB rays that enable them to produce vitamin D3 and metabolize calcium.
